title: Physics simulation burst
symptoms: physics2dserver flush_queries or a physics step dominates the frame
flush queries spikes when many bodies are active
physics broadphase or simulation cost jumps in one frame
hitch when many rigid bodies wake or collide at once
mechanism: The physics engine resolves an unusually large batch of active bodies, contacts or queries in a single step, so the physics flush overruns the frame budget.
diagnosis_hints: Compare the active rigid-body and contact count in the hitch frame against neighbours; check for a burst of newly woken or spawned bodies.
typical_fixes: cap or stagger the number of bodies activated per frame
use simpler collision shapes and sleeping thresholds
move heavy queries off the hot path or amortise them across frames
